name: Jane Bland
termEnd: Current court term pending election-record review

contactInfo.office: Supreme Court Building, 201 W. 14th Street, Room 104, Austin, Texas 78701

bio: Jane Bland serves as Place 6 Justice on the Supreme Court of Texas. The Texas Judicial Branch says she has served on the Court since 2019 after prior service on the First Court of Appeals and as a state district judge.
